decision_name: Source layer selection for 5 tranche-1 pre_game families
candidates_considered: raw_flat (replay_players_raw + matches_flat); cleaned_raw (matches_flat_clean); view_layer (matches_history_minimal + player_history_all); hybrid (MHM for pair + matches_flat_clean for static columns)
rationale_excerpt_300char: matches_flat_clean is chosen as the source layer for all 5 tranche-1 pre_game families. It natively scopes to 22,209 true 1v1 decisive replays × 2 player rows = 44,418 rows (matching EXPECTED_MFC_ROW_COUNT per Invariant I5), carrying all required columns (race, metadata_mapName, metadata_gameVersion

decision_name: Phase-02 row-identity anchor (BINDING) + Phase-03 hold-out anchor (RECOMMENDATION)
candidates_considered: details_timeUTC (raw VARCHAR from matches_flat_clean); started_at (harmonized TIMESTAMP from matches_history_minimal); hybrid (started_at as row-identity; details_timeUTC as provenance-only)
chosen: Q2(a) started_at TIMESTAMP from MHM (BINDING); Q2(b) started_at TIMESTAMP RECOMMENDATION ONLY for Phase-03 hold-out
rationale_excerpt_300char: Q2(a) Phase-02 row-identity anchor — BINDING: started_at TIMESTAMP from matches_history_minimal is chosen. CROSS-02-00 §3.1 declares TIMESTAMP as the canonical cross-dataset dtype for the temporal anchor; §3.2 retains details_timeUTC VARCHAR as the sc2egset-specific raw anchor for provenance only. T

decision_name: Race-column adjudication: cleaning-layer RATIFY vs AMEND (RISK-26)
candidates_considered: Q3.RATIFY: retain cleaning-layer convention (race = PRE_GAME canon; selectedRace excluded); Q3.AMEND: patch cleaning-layer YAMLs + CROSS-02-02 §6.1 to restore selectedRace as canonical pre-game race (RISK-26 literal compliance)
rationale_excerpt_300char: Q3 outcome chosen: RATIFY the existing cleaning-layer convention. Two candidate outcomes were considered as live options throughout: Q3.RATIFY (retain the cleaning-layer convention: race = PRE_GAME analytical canon; selectedRace excluded from cleaned views) and Q3.AMEND (patch the cleaning-layer YAM
spec_amendments_proposed: CROSS-02-02 §6.1 minor: MHM faction derives from race and so excludes Random from its vocabulary; the 4th value Random lives only in selectedRace in replay_players_raw
